channel.title: human-resources - Tag - Adam Barreiro Costa | Software Engineer
channel.description: human-resources - Tag - Adam Barreiro Costa | Software Engineer

item.title: My experience with hiring processes
item.author: Author
item.description: In some weeks I’ll be starting a new adventure in another company. In this post I’m sharing some tips and ideas about hiring processes after sending countless resumes, facing innumerable interviews, technical challenges, and finally being hired by a promising team. My previous experience Before I decided to leave my current employer I participated in no more than three hiring processes, so we can say that I had almost no experience at all in terms of how to behave and how to succeed.
